S

SAVE_FILE_NAME - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.persistence.GamePersistenceManager
File name for the serialized game session.
saveNickname(String) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.persistence.GamePersistenceManager
Writes the player's nickname to the plain-text player file, overwriting any previous value.
saveSession(GameSession) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.persistence.GamePersistenceManager
Serializes session and writes it to the save file, overwriting any existing save.
SceneManager - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view
Singleton class responsible for managing the primary JavaFX Stage and handling scene transitions throughout the application.
SceneManager() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.SceneManager
 
selectFromTray(Node, ShipType) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
selection - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
Currently held ship, or null if nothing is selected.
Selection(ShipType, Orientation, Ship, Node) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController.Selection
 
selectNextShot(Board) - Method in interface com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy.IMachineShotStrategy
Chooses the next coordinate to fire at, on the given target board.
selectNextShot(Board) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy.RandomHuntStrategy
Selects the next coordinate to fire at.
selectPlacedShip(Ship) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController

session - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency.MachineTurnThread
 
setCellHighlight(Coordinate, boolean) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
Marks a cell as a valid or invalid placement target while the player is dragging a ship, by toggling a CSS class rather than setting an explicit fill, so the actual color stays defined in the stylesheet.
setGameState(GameState) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.GameSession
Updates the game state (e.g.
setHumanTurn(boolean) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.GameSession
Sets which player's turn it is explicitly (used when loading a saved session).
setMainStage(Stage) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.SceneManager
Assigns the primary stage for the application.
setNickname(String) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Sets the nickname shown above the player's board.
setOnCellClicked(EventHandler<MouseEvent>) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
Attaches a click handler to every cell in the grid.
setState(CellState) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Cell
Updates this cell's state.
setTurnIndicatorActive(boolean) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
Toggles this board's turn-indicator border on or off.
Ship - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities
Represents a single ship placed on a board: its type, orientation, the coordinates it occupies and which of those coordinates have already been hit.
Ship(ShipType, Orientation, Set<Coordinate>) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Ship
Creates a ship of the given type occupying the given coordinates.
SHIP - Enum constant in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.CellState
A ship occupies the cell and it has not been fired upon.
SHIP_CAPSULE_ARC - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardTheme
Corner radius used for destroyer/submarine end caps, producing a full semicircle ("capsule") look.
shipNodes - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
Visual node currently on screen for each placed ship, so it can be moved or removed.
shipOverlays - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardSpriteLayer
Maps a placed Ship to its currently displayed overlay ImageView.
ShipShapeFactory - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes
Builds the JavaFX Group representing a ship's visual body.
ShipShapeFactory() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.ShipShapeFactory
 
ShipTrayView - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board
Builds the fleet tray shown below the player's board, listing every ship in the fleet in the "shadow" style used for already-placed ships.
ShipTrayView() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.ShipTrayView
Builds the two-row tray with one shadow-styled entry per ship.
shipType - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController.Selection
 
shipType - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController.TraySelectAdapter
 
shipType - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Ship
 
ShipType - Enum Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums
Defines the four ship categories available in the fleet, along with the number of cells each ship occupies and how many units of that type must be placed on a single board.
ShipType(String, int, int) - Constructor for enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType
 
shooter - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Shot
 
Shooter() - Constructor for enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Shot.Shooter
 
Shot - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities
Immutable record of a single shot fired during the match.
Shot(Coordinate, CellState, Shot.Shooter) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Shot
Creates a new shot record.
Shot.Shooter - Enum Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities
Identifies which side fired the shot.
ShotClickAdapter() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController.ShotClickAdapter
 
shotHistory - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.GameSession
Ordered history of every shot fired in the match, used to reconstruct the visual board state after loading a saved game.
shotStrategy - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.MachinePlayer
 
showNextInstruction() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Displays the next tutorial page.
showPreviousInstruction() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Displays the previous tutorial page.
showResultOverlay(GameState) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Shows the win/lose overlay and clears both turn indicators.
size - Variable in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType
 
sourceTrayEntry - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController.Selection
 
spriteLayer - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController

Loads PNG sprites from the classpath and creates ImageView overlays for ships and shot markers.
SpriteOverlayFactory() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.SpriteOverlayFactory
 
start(Stage) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.Main
Framework callback signaling runtime startup completion structures.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.AppInitializer
Configures the window parameters, registers the scene infrastructure, and sets the initial view.
startCombat() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Called when the player presses "Play" once their fleet is complete.
startNewGame() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.MenuController
Loads game-view.fxml fresh (a brand-new Board and PlacementController come with it, since GameController builds them in its own initialize()), and hands it the player's nickname.
state - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Cell
 
SUBMARINE - Enum constant in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType
 
SUNK - Enum constant in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.CellState
A shot hit a ship part, and the ship it belongs to is completely sunk.
switchScene(String) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.SceneManager
Switches the current scene on the main stage to the specified FXML view.
